overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy nighttime journey through the outskirts of Night City. The player character emerges from beneath a concrete overpass, traverses a foggy grassy hillside with palm trees, and reaches a wet illuminated highway with the futuristic neon-lit city skyline visible in the distance.

events.description: exits covered area under concrete overpass into open foggy grassland

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass and palm trees under a massive concrete overpass in heavy rain

entered.detail: large white concrete beams and metal framework forming the overpass overhead
tropical palm trees scattered through the grassy area
tall wet grass and muddy ground beneath the overpass
faint glowing lights visible through the fog and rain

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass with large structural beams overhead. The camera moves forward through tall wet grass and palm trees, emerging from the sheltered area into the open foggy night where distant city lights glow through the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside dirt path approaching urban road

events.description: begins ascending the hillside on a winding dirt path
approaching bright streetlights along the road above, illuminating the fog

agents.ego_description: climbing the muddy hillside path toward the illuminated highway above, navigating through patches of grass

entered.detail: muddy trail winding up the hillside toward the road
tall modern street lamps lining the approaching highway

segments.scene_description: Moving up a grassy hillside on a dirt path, leaving the overpass behind. The terrain becomes more open and exposed to the heavy rain, with bright streetlights from the highway above becoming visible through the fog as the elevation increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet multi-lane highway with city overlook

events.description: steps onto paved highway and turns to reveal futuristic city skyline with stadium structure
passing under bright LED streetlights with heavy rain creating reflections on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking along the highway guardrail, observing the illuminated Night City skyline and futuristic architecture

entered.detail: wet multi-lane road with yellow dividing lines reflecting streetlights
metal safety barrier with reflective strips along the road edge
cyberpunk cityscape with large stadium-like structure and neon-lit skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a paved highway as the camera emerges from the hillside. Turning left reveals a stunning view of the Night City skyline with its distinctive futuristic stadium structure and neon lights. The wet asphalt reflects the bright streetlights as heavy rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving coastal highway with palm tree median

events.description: road curves gently to the right while maintaining forward progression along the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the rain-slicked highway past rows of palm trees and modern streetlights, with the city visible in the distance

entered.detail: palm trees lining the left side of the highway median

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a continuous walk along the wet illuminated highway. The road curves gently through the rainy night, lined with palm trees and modern streetlights. The futuristic city skyline remains visible on the left while the highway stretches ahead into the foggy distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered shadows of a concrete overpass into the expansive, neon-lit vista of a futuristic city. It begins beneath massive structural beams, moving through tall wet grass and palm trees as it emerges from the shelter into a heavy, foggy rain. As the camera ascends a grassy hillside along a dirt path, the terrain opens up and the glow of overhead streetlights becomes visible through the mist. The scene then transitions onto a paved highway, where a left turn reveals the stunning Night City skyline and its distinctive stadium structure reflecting off the wet asphalt. Finally, the camera continues along the curving, illuminated road, flanked by palm trees and modern lights as the highway stretches forward into the rainy distance.
